---
name: Security report
about: Report a security vulnerability (private)
title: '[security] '
labels: security

---

> **Please do not file public issues for security vulnerabilities.**
> Use https://github.com/TopiTech/one-min-ai-monaco-client/security/advisories/new
> instead. Only use this template if the private reporting channel is
> unavailable.

## Summary

Short description of the vulnerability.

## Impact

Who is affected and what could an attacker do?

## Reproduction

Minimal steps or proof-of-concept code.

## Suggested Remediation

If you have a fix in mind, describe it.
